MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN F. LEE, ESQ., 415.863.4336, FOR PLAINTIFF SIDNEY CLAYTON HOLTER.
ELIZABETH PEDERSON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND OSCAR TAYLOR.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and OSCAR TAYLOR's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is denied. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether Deputy Taylor assaulted plaintiff. (Plaintiff's deposition, 175:15-20, 226:10-11). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
